title: Tyrone May
extract:
Tyrone May (born 21 June 1996) is a Samoa international rugby league footballer who plays for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League. Primarily a stand-off, May has played in a number of other positions during his career, including centre, scrum-half, loose forward and fullback.
May previously played for the Penrith Panthers in the NRL with whom he won the 2021 NRL Grand Final coming off the bench.
